x.description: A numeric vector or unit object specifying circle x-locations relative to center

y.description: A numeric vector, unit object, or a character vector of values containing a "b" combined with a numeric value specifying circle y-locations relative to center

r.description: A numeric vector or unit object specifying radii

default.units.description: A string indicating the default units to use if r, x, or y are only given as numerics or numeric vectors

linecolor.description: A character value specifying circle line color

lwd.description: A numeric specifying circle line width

lty.description: A numeric specifying circle line type

fill.description: A character value specifying circle fill color

alpha.description: A numeric value specifying color transparency

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters
